title: Estonia Won the War on Fentanyl. What Came Next Was Even Worse.
summary_full: By 2018, fentanyl overdoses in Estonia had plummeted. But powerful new drugs are appearing fast, with the authorities racing to respond.
summary_public: By 2018, fentanyl overdoses in Estonia had plummeted. But powerful new drugs are appearing fast, with the authorities racing to respond.

EE.label: positive
EE.evidence: Estonia Won the War on Fentanyl
